title: Eversource (ES) to Gain From Investments & Renewable Focus
text: Eversource's (ES) strategic investment plans and expansion of renewable operations will further improve its performance.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES ) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript November 8, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Robert Becker - Investor Relations Director Joseph Nolan - Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer John Moreira - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Steve Fleishman - Wolfe Research David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Nicholas Campanella - Barclays Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Jeremy Tonet - JP Morgan Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Travis Miller - Morningstar Operator Hello, and welcome to the Eversource Energy Q3 2023 Earnings Call. My name is Alex, and I'll be coordinating the call today.

title: Eversource (ES) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Eversource's (ES) third-quarter earnings and revenues decline year over year. Total operating expenses also reduce during the same period.

title: Eversource Energy Reports Third Quarter Results
text: HARTFORD, Conn. & BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eversource Energy reports third quarter earnings of $339.7 million, or $0.97 per share, for the third quarter of 2023.

title: Dependable dividends: Why utility stocks are on fire
text: Exactly what you'd think: utilities stocks, which are tried-and-true dividend payers, are trending higher. The Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund NYSEARCA: XLU is up 4.72% in the past week.

title: Eversource Energy (ES) to Post Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Eversource Energy's (ES) third-quarter 2023 results are expected to benefit from the completed sale of the uncommitted lease area. However, rate design might lower revenues.
